top3.sql:
SELECT 
    SUM(
        CASE 
            WHEN pn.pizza_name = 'Meat Lovers' THEN 12
            WHEN pn.pizza_name = 'Vegetarian' THEN 10
            ELSE 0
        END
        + COALESCE(ge.extras_count, 0)
    ) AS total_income
FROM pizza_customer_orders pco
JOIN pizza_names pn ON pco.pizza_id = pn.pizza_id
LEFT JOIN pizza_get_extras ge ON pco.order_id = ge.order_id
WHERE pco.order_id NOT IN (
    SELECT order_id 
    FROM pizza_runner_orders 
    WHERE cancellation IS NOT NULL AND cancellat...
